response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and strong technical leadership in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and mobile platforms (iOS/Apple TV). However, his people management experience is limited to informal mentoring and workshop leadership, falling short of the 2-year requirement. His work in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks aligns with developer tooling needs, but lacks direct experience with build systems and compiler development.
strengths: Deep expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and mobile platforms (iOS, Apple TV)
Strong technical leadership in open-source projects and workshops (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven ability to optimize systems (e.g., pricing strategies for Optilyz, low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby)
concerns: Limited formal people management experience (only informal mentoring and workshop leadership)
No direct experience with build systems or compiler development (core focus areas for the role)
Mobile platform knowledge is present but not emphasized as a primary focus in recent roles

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure experience
Build systems and compiler development exposure
